zh.Soulbury, Buckinghamshire, England: 英國巴金哈姆爾素爾波利

zh.lifeSummary: 當Hawisia de Somery於大約1162年出生在英國斯塔福爾時，她的父親John de Somery38歲，母親Hawise Paynel19歲。她和Walter Maunsell至少有7個兒子和3個女兒。

zh-hans.Little Missenden, Buckinghamshire, Engla: 英国巴金哈姆爾蕾托 米森登
zh-hans.Soulbury, Buckinghamshire, England: 英国巴金哈姆爾素爾波利
zh-hans.Tickford End, Buckinghamshire, England: 英国巴金哈姆爾迪福德 恩德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hawisia de Somery于大约1162年出生在英国斯塔福爾时，她的父亲John de Somery38岁，母亲Hawise Paynel19岁。她和Walter Maunsell至少有7个儿子和3个女儿。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Somery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Abelino, Adela, Alberto, Alfredo, Ana, Angel, Asuncion, Domingo, Elena, Emiliano, Emilio, Eusebio.
Spanish: possibly a habitational name from La Somera in Cuenca province, named from somero ‘shallow’. This surname is most common in the Philippines.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Hawisia de Somery was born about 1162, in Staffordshire, England, her father, John de Somery, was 38 and her mother, Hawise Paynel, was 19. She had at least 7 sons and 3 daughters with Walter Maunsell.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hawisia de Somery est née environ 1162, à Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, John de Somery, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Hawise Paynel, avait 19 ans. Elle a eu au moins 7 fils et 3 filles avec Walter Maunsell.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hawisia de Somery um 1162 in Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John de Somery 38 und ihre Mutter Hawise Paynel 19. Sie hatte mit Walter Maunsell mindestens 7 Söhne und 3 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hawisia de Somery è nata il circa 1162 nel Staffordshire, England, sua padre, John de Somery, aveva 38 anni e sua madre, Hawise Paynel, aveva 19 anni. Lei avuto almeno 7 figli e 3 figlie con Walter Maunsell.

ja.Little Missenden, Buckinghamshire, Engla: イギリスブクインガムシュアイアリットル ミセンデン
ja.Buckinghamshire, England: イギリスブクインガムシュアイア
ja.Ergyng, Herefordshire, England: イギリスハーエフォードシュアイア
ja.Soulbury, Buckinghamshire, England: イギリスブクインガムシュアイアソウルブリー
ja.Staffordshire, England: イギリススタフォードシュアイア
ja.Tickford End, Buckinghamshire, England: イギリスブクインガムシュアイアティクフォード エンド
ja.lifeSummary: Hawisia de Someryが約1162年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，父John de Someryは38歳，母Hawise Paynelは19歳であった。彼女はWalter Maunsellとの間に少なくとも7人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Hawisia de Somery(이)가 대략 1162년 영국 스태퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John de Somery(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Hawise Paynel(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 Walter Maunsell(와)과 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hawisia de Somery nasceu aproximadamente 1162, em Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Somery, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Hawise Paynel, tinha 19 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 7 filhos e 3 filhas com Walter Maunsell.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hawisia de Somery родилась около 1162 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени John de Somery было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Hawise Paynel, 19. У неё было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 3 дочери от Walter Maunsell.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hawisia de Somery nació aproximadamente 1162, en Staffordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John de Somery, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Hawise Paynel, tenía 19 años. Tuvo por lo menos 7 hijos y 3 hijas con Walter Maunsell.
